title: The Cathedral of Rust and Code, Graustark TX/LA
subtitle: Frasier Temple's warehouse · the whole tarot built into the floor
notes: Frasier's converted river-side warehouse. Twenty-two arcana stations laid into the floor as miniatures + installations: an INNER cluster of Graustark-adjacent finished pieces around the kitchen-workbench, and an OUTER cluster of under-construction TEST AREA models for the places he's never been. The steamboat sits on the workbench at MAGICIAN — the central object of the location, and the thing whose completion fires the cross-arcana sinkhole. Stations are walkable nodes; the player navigates between Frasier's living space, the tarot deck, and Graustark itself simultaneously.

spaces.label: WAREHOUSE BAY
spaces.flavor: the sliding bay door; his front door

spaces.label: RIVER WINDOW
spaces.flavor: the cathedral's tall side window; the river beyond

spaces.label: ROOF HATCH
spaces.flavor: ladder up; opens later

spaces.label: MAGICIAN · WORKBENCH
spaces.flavor: the kitchen-workbench. The steamboat is here.

spaces.label: FOOL · DINER MODEL
spaces.flavor: 1:48 scale of D'Ambrosio's, lit warm

spaces.label: PRIESTESS · TAPES
spaces.flavor: Elicia's archive — cassettes labeled in her hand

spaces.label: EMPRESS · LETTERS
spaces.flavor: Nicola's letter wall — twenty years of correspondence

spaces.label: EMPEROR · DANTE'S CHAIR
spaces.flavor: Dante's office chair, reconstructed from photos

spaces.label: HIEROPHANT · ALTAR
spaces.flavor: river-window altar — incense + an open river-stone

spaces.label: LOVERS · BRIAR FALLS WIP
spaces.flavor: trees wired, not painted. The wedding pavilion is foam-core. A tracing-paper Smolvud overlay drapes from the rafter.

spaces.label: CHARIOT · TRUCK CAB
spaces.flavor: the front cab of a stripped delivery truck, still smelling of motor oil

spaces.label: STRENGTH · PRESS
spaces.flavor: a hand-press for prints — twenty pounds of cast iron

spaces.label: HERMIT · BBS TERMINAL
spaces.flavor: phosphor-green CRT. RUST_CODE.BBS hums here too.

spaces.label: WHEEL · HARMONY CREEK WIP
spaces.flavor: 1:48 cul-de-sac. Lawn paint drying. All identical houses except one.

spaces.label: JUSTICE · LEDGER
spaces.flavor: a ledger book open mid-page. Two columns, mostly the right one filled.

spaces.label: HANGED MAN · MONTREAL WIP
spaces.flavor: post-sinkhole refuge city. Cabane-à-sucre tin roofs. A small pewter Saint-Laurent. Half-built — Frasier's never been.

spaces.label: DEATH · MASK SHELF
spaces.flavor: plaster casts of faces, none labeled, all watched

spaces.label: TEMPERANCE · STILL
spaces.flavor: a working copper still, slow drip

spaces.label: DEVIL · EMPTY STOOL
spaces.flavor: a single bar stool, no bar. The man at the bar sits here.

spaces.label: TOWER · SHARP'S CLUB WIP
spaces.flavor: Sharp's basement club, built from memory. The most-finished of the unfinished.

spaces.label: STAR · LIGHT RIG
spaces.flavor: a cluster of cold-blue LEDs in a ring on a stand

spaces.label: MOON · POOL
spaces.flavor: a flat reflecting pool, knee-deep, lit from below

spaces.label: SUN · SOLAR LAMP
spaces.flavor: a salvaged sodium-vapor lamp warm on a single chair

spaces.label: JUDGEMENT · BLANK STAGE
spaces.flavor: an empty platform. Frasier knows this one is coming. He doesn't yet know what it's of.

spaces.label: WORLD · GLOBE FRAME
spaces.flavor: a wireframe globe armature, no continents yet

drift_attractors.notes: Visitors that linger without a connection drift toward these spaces. The Devil's stool is the cold attractor; the kitchen/workbench is the warm one. Frasier's visitors are RUST_CODE callers, his sister Elicia (different beat than her vol5 visit), and the Demon.

on_end_action_phase.note: the workbench gives back what you give it
the BBS gives you a beat
the tracing-paper Smolvud goes one step more legible
the platform takes whatever you bring

wip_models.notes: Every WIP model starts as a fresh hull at game start. Each run the player picks which models to push. First-ever completion of a model fires a persistent codex annotation; the model itself still resets to WIP next launch.

steamboat.notes: The kitchen-workbench's central model. Lives at MAGICIAN. Not a WIP_model entry because its completion is the SCENARIO win-trigger, not a codex annotation. Each run starts as a bare hull; finishing fires `milestone:steamboat_finished` cross-arcana flag, which the next Fool launch reads to mutate its board.
